key.name: sample-seconds
key.description: Seconds between bandwidth samples for the panel summary and dropdown.

key.name: selection-mode
key.description: Choose whether the extension follows the best active interface automatically or a preferred interface name.

key.name: preferred-interface
key.description: Interface name to use when primary interface mode is set to preferred.

key.name: include-tunnel-interfaces
key.description: Allow VPN or tunnel devices to become the primary interface in automatic mode.

key.name: include-loopback-interfaces
key.description: Include loopback devices in the dropdown rows.

key.name: show-aggregate
key.description: Display a combined traffic row in the dropdown and use it for the panel summary when more than one interface is active.

key.name: rate-unit-mode
key.description: Choose whether traffic rates are shown with byte or bit scaling.
